description_long: This object is a double-barreled shotgun with a classic break-action design, featuring two parallel barrels of equal length. The barrels are long and cylindrical, finished in a dark, matte metal, and the break-action hinge is visible near the breech. The stock is a compact pistol grip style, made of a dark, possibly wooden or synthetic material, with a smooth ergonomic curve for handling. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a single trigger, with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement. The overall construction appears robust, with metallic components dominating the build and a minimalistic, utilitarian aesthetic. The shotgun is designed for handheld use and is typical of those found in urban or civilian settings.
description: A double-barreled, break-action shotgun with a dark metal finish and a compact pistol grip stock. It features two parallel barrels and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin barrels aligned vertically and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the double barrels, the break-action hinge, and the pistol grip stock.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the breech end of the barrels and the back of the pistol grip.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the trigger guard and grip more visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, equal length, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized, smooth with no finger grooves or reinforcement
